validation_rules.requirement: Any single expense at or above NGN 15,000

validation_rules.notes: Must reference the project or site visited
Only one valid receipt per expense

validation_rules.requirement: Claim with no receipt or unreadable total
validation_rules.notes: Receipt photo required for all claims

validation_rules.requirement: Submitted more than 30 days after the expense

context: Rules used when reviewing staff expense claims for McBride & Associates site and office costs.
